description: It's cold and damp in here. Glowing moss illuminates the walls, but the corners are filled with deep, inky shadows. You can hear the sound of dripping water echoing through the cavern.

wall.description: Rough, damp stone walls. The rock feels slick with moisture.

floor.description: A layer of damp earth and thick, spongey moss cushions your steps.

edge_e.description: A small tunnel leads back up toward the forest surface.

dark_hollow.description: A very dark hollow in the cave wall. It's too dark to see anything inside.

conditions.failMessage: You can't see anything in this pitch-black hollow. You might need a light source.

contains.name: Ancient Potato
contains.description: An ancient, petrified potato found in a secret cave. It smells like earth and history.

item.onCollect: You reach into the hollow and find an ancient, petrified-but-still-edible potato! It's a miracle!
